Title: User logs in successfully
Preconditions: User has a valid username and password.
Test Steps:
1. User enters the username and password.
2. User clicks the login button.
3. System verifies the credentials.
4. System displays a successful login message.
Expected Result: User is logged in successfully.

Title: User logs in with invalid credentials
Preconditions: User has an invalid username or password.
Test Steps:
1. User enters the username and password.
2. User clicks the login button.
3. System verifies the credentials.
4. System displays an error message.
Expected Result: Login fails and an error message is displayed.

Title: User logs out successfully
Test Steps:
1. User clicks the logout button.
2. System logs the user out.
3. System displays a logout confirmation message.
Expected Result: User is logged out successfully.

Title: Admin adds a product
Test Data:
- Product Name: New Product
- Product Description: This is a new product.
Test Steps:
1. Admin logs in.
2. Admin navigates to the product management section.
3. Admin clicks the "Add Product" button.
4. Admin enters the product name and description.
5. Admin clicks the "Save" button.
6. System saves the product.
Expected Result: Product is added successfully.

Title: Admin removes a product
Preconditions: Admin is logged in and a product exists.
Test Steps:
1. Admin logs in.
2. Admin navigates to the product management section.
3. Admin selects the product to remove.
4. Admin clicks the "Remove" button.
5. System removes the product.
Expected Result: Product is removed successfully.

Title: User adds an item to the cart
Preconditions: User is logged in and an item exists.
Test Steps:
1. User logs in.
2. User navigates to the product page.
3. User clicks the "Add to Cart" button.
4. System adds the item to the cart.
Expected Result: Item is added to the cart successfully.

Title: User removes an item from the cart
Preconditions: User is logged in and an item exists in the cart.
Test Steps:
1. User logs in.
2. User navigates to the cart page.
3. User selects the item to remove.
4. User clicks the "Remove" button.
5. System removes the item from the cart.
Expected Result: Item is removed from the cart successfully.

Title: Server starts the database connection
Test Steps:
1. Server starts.
2. Server attempts to connect to the database.
3. System confirms the database connection.
Expected Result: Database connection is established successfully.

Title: Server stops the database connection
Preconditions: Server is running and connected to the database.
Test Steps:
1. Server stops.
2. Server disconnects from the database.
3. System confirms the database disconnection.
Expected Result: Database connection is terminated successfully.

Title: User connects to the database
Test Steps:
1. User logs in.
2. User attempts to connect to the database.
3. System confirms the database connection.
Expected Result: User is connected to the database successfully.

Title: User disconnects from the database
Preconditions: User is connected to the database.
Test Steps:
1. User attempts to disconnect from the database.
2. System confirms the database disconnection.
Expected Result: User is disconnected from the database successfully.

Title: User interacts with the calendar
Test Steps:
1. User logs in.
2. User initiates the calendar.
3. User interacts with the calendar.
Expected Result: User successfully interacts with the calendar.

Title: Train starts at a station
Test Steps:
1. Train is at a station.
2. Train starts.
Expected Result: Train starts successfully.

Title: Train stops at a station
Test Steps:
1. Train is moving.
2. Train stops.
Expected Result: Train stops successfully.

Title: Payload is displayed on the train
Test Steps:
1. Train is moving.
2. Payload is displayed on the train.
Expected Result: Payload is displayed on the train successfully.
